mnemonics.title: Smart City Components
mnemonics.content: ITEWP - Infrastructure, Transportation, Energy, Waste management, Public safety - the five pillars of a smart city

mnemonics.title: IoT Ecosystem Layers
mnemonics.content: SNCAD - Sensors collect, Networks transmit, Cloud analyzes, Apps manage, Dashboards display

mnemonics.title: Smart City Examples
mnemonics.content: SBC - Singapore (traffic+energy), Barcelona (waste+water), Copenhagen (environment) - three leading smart city implementations

mnemonics.title: Smart City Challenges
mnemonics.content: SPIDE - Security risks, Privacy concerns, Interoperability issues, Digital divide, E-waste from devices
